candidate_definition_hints.text: A curated list of OpenClaw resources, tools, skills, tutorials & articles. OpenClaw (formerly Moltbot / Clawdbot) — open-source self-hosted AI agent for WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord & 50+ integrations.
